title: myosotis gussonei
intro: Myosotis gussonei, also known as Gussone's forget-me-not, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of M. gussonei include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in reducing fever and alleviating coughs. Herbal preparations of M. gussonei typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications.
